records.name: Yahoo
records.title: Yahoo
records.description: All 3 billion Yahoo user accounts compromised; disclosed 2016, expanded 2017.

records.name: Adobe
records.title: Adobe
records.description: 152M Adobe accounts exposed with weakly-encrypted passwords and plaintext hints.

records.name: LinkedIn
records.title: LinkedIn
records.description: 164M LinkedIn accounts disclosed via unsalted SHA-1 hash dump.

records.name: MyFitnessPal
records.title: MyFitnessPal
records.description: Under-Armour-owned MyFitnessPal lost 144M accounts in February 2018.

records.name: Marriott
records.title: Marriott (Starwood)
records.description: 383M Starwood guest records exposed; FTC + UK ICO penalties followed.

records.name: Facebook
records.title: Facebook
records.description: 509M Facebook records scraped via contact-import flaw; public dump April 2021.

records.name: Twitter200M
records.title: Twitter (200M)
records.description: 200M Twitter records compiled via API enumeration vulnerability.

records.name: TMobile
records.title: T-Mobile
records.description: 47M T-Mobile customer + applicant records including SSNs and DOBs.

records.name: Equifax
records.title: Equifax
records.description: 147M US consumers' credit data breached; $700M FTC settlement.

records.name: Target
records.title: Target
records.description: 40M payment cards + 70M customer records compromised via HVAC vendor.

records.name: HomeDepot
records.title: Home Depot
records.description: 56M payment cards exposed via PoS malware; $200M+ in settlements.

records.name: UnderArmour
records.title: Under Armour
records.description: MyFitnessPal breach (Under Armour subsidiary).

records.name: eBay
records.title: eBay
records.description: 145M eBay user records compromised after employee credential theft.

records.name: Dropbox
records.title: Dropbox
records.description: 68M Dropbox accounts breached in mid-2012; disclosed 2016.

records.name: Uber
records.title: Uber
records.description: 57M Uber rider + driver records; concealed for a year, $148M state-AG settlement.

records.name: SonyPSN
records.title: Sony PSN
records.description: 77M PlayStation Network accounts compromised; PSN offline 23 days.

records.name: CapitalOne
records.title: Capital One
records.description: 106M Capital One credit applicants breached; $190M class settlement.

records.name: TJX
records.title: TJX Companies
records.description: 94M payment cards stolen across TJ Maxx / Marshalls / HomeGoods stores.

records.name: ATT
records.title: AT&T
records.description: 73M current + former AT&T customers exposed on the dark web in 2024.

records.name: Anthem
records.title: Anthem
records.description: 78.8M Anthem health insurance customers breached; $115M class settlement.

records.name: JPMorgan
records.title: JPMorgan Chase
records.description: 76M household + 7M small-business records compromised at JPMorgan Chase.

records.name: Wendys
records.title: Wendy's
records.description: 1,025 Wendy's locations affected by PoS malware exposing payment cards.

records.name: Chipotle
records.title: Chipotle
records.description: Chipotle PoS malware compromised payment data at ~2,250 restaurants.

records.name: DoorDash
records.title: DoorDash
records.description: 4.9M DoorDash users + Dashers exposed by third-party service provider.

records.name: Robinhood
records.title: Robinhood
records.description: 7M Robinhood customers exposed via social-engineered customer support.

records.name: Twitch
records.title: Twitch
records.description: 125GB of Twitch source code + streamer payouts leaked due to server misconfiguration.

records.name: Slack
records.title: Slack
records.description: 5.2M Slack accounts compromised via unauthorized DB access.

records.name: Zoom
records.title: Zoom
records.description: 530K Zoom credentials posted on dark web during pandemic-era expansion.

records.name: Discord
records.title: Discord
records.description: Discord.io confirmed 760K user records breached in 2023.

records.name: Snapchat
records.title: Snapchat
records.description: 4.6M Snapchat usernames + phone numbers exposed via Find Friends API abuse.
